dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: ARE YOU OKAY, MAEHWA?

dialogue.speaker: MAEHA
dialogue.line: YOU POOR BOY!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HEY, JAYEONG! WHAT'S WRONG WITH YOU?!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HOW CAN YOU JUST HIT AN INNOCENT PERSON LIKE THAT- HUH?!

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: MAEHA, OR WHATEVER YOUR NAME IS. LISTEN CAREFULLY.

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: I CAN SEE THAT YOU'RE ALL EXCITED TO GET ATTENTION FROM PEOPLE OR WHATEVER, BUT DON'T YOU DARE GET OUT OF LINE AND LOSE CONTROL AGAIN LIKE LAST TIME. I DON'T CARE IF YOU HAVE THE BUTTERFLY POWER. WE DON'T HAVE TIME TO CLEAN UP AFTER YOU. LIKE SARA SAID, WE'RE IN A DIFFICULT SITUATION RIGHT NOW. EVERYONE IS AFRAID THAT WE'LL GET WIPED OUT AGAIN. THE BUGS JUST KEEP MULTIPLYING AS TIME GOES ON. AND MORE AND MORE PEOPLE ARE GETTING DEVOURED BY THE BUGS LIKE YOUR SISTER. BUT THE BUTTERFLY GODDESS'S BLOOD HAS ALL DRIED UP NOW, WHICH MEANS WE CAN'T MAKE ANY MORE BUTTERFLIES. THAT'S WHY WE BROUGHT YOU HERE AS A LAST RESORT. BUT EVERYONE WAS WORRIED, INCLUDING ME AND THE OTHER RESEARCHERS. WE THOUGHT...

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: THE FOURTH BUTTERFLY HAS LIVED A NORMAL LIFE SINCE HIS ESCAPE. WHAT IF HE GETS SCARED THAT WE'RE SUDDENLY ASKING HIM TO SAVE US? WHAT IF HE RUNS AWAY BECAUSE THE BURDEN IS TOO GREAT? HOW ARE WE GOING TO KEEP HIM HERE?

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: BUT WHAT A RELIEF! I GUESS WE WON'T HAVE TO WORRY ABOUT YOU RUNNING AWAY SINCE YOU'RE SO EAGER TO GET STARTED! THEN WHY AM I SO ANGRY, YOU ASK?! LISTEN, FOURTH BUTTERFLY. YOU'D BETTER REMEMBER THE RESPONSIBILITY THAT COMES WITH THE NAME. YOU HAVE TO EARN YOUR KEEP IF YOU WANT YOUR NEW FAMILY TO LOVE YOU. OTHERWISE, IF YOU THINK THIS IS JUST SOME LITTLE GAME, YOU'LL EITHER GET KICKED OUT OR SLAUGHTERED LIKE AN ANIMAL BEFORE ANYONE EVER HEARS YOUR NAME!

dialogue.speaker: GUIDE
dialogue.line: I'M REALLY... SHE HAS A FEISTY TEMPER. LET ME APOLOGIZE FOR HER. ARE YOU OKAY? DID SHE UPSET YOU?

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: NO, I'M FINE. BUT I'D LIKE TO KNOW... IS WHAT SHE SAID... TRUE?

dialogue.speaker: GUIDE
dialogue.line: HM? WHICH PART?

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: EARN YOUR KEEP OR YOU'RE OUT OF HERE!

dialogue.speaker: GUIDE
dialogue.line: AHH, THAT. ER, UM... WELL, STRICTLY SPEAKING, T-THAT IS TRUE. HAHA. IF WE DECIDE THAT YOU'RE UNFIT FOR COMBAT, WE'LL HAVE TO GET RID OF YOU, EVEN IF YOU ARE A BUTTERFLY.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: THAT'S WHAT I THOUGHT.

dialogue.speaker: GUIDE
dialogue.line: AW, BUT YOU'RE GETTING AHEAD OF YOURSELF! RIGHT NOW, YOU JUST NEED TO FOCUS ON GETTING USED TO--

dialogue.speaker: GUIDE
dialogue.line: MAEHA?

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: I'LL WORK HARD. SO COULD YOU FINISH SHOWING ME AROUND?

dialogue.speaker: GUIDE
dialogue.line: HUH?

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: BEFORE I CAN EARN MY KEEP, I HAVE TO KNOW WHAT KIND OF HOME I'M LIVING IN, RIGHT?

dialogue.speaker: GUIDE
dialogue.line: OH, O-OF COURSE! YOU'RE RIGHT! LET ME FINISH THE TOUR! FOLLOW ME!

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: THANK YOU.

dialogue.speaker: GUIDE
dialogue.line: NOW, IN HERE IS... THE GUARD ROOM. THE GUARDS MANAGE AND SUPPORT BUTTERFLY MISSIONS DIRECTLY.

dialogue.speaker: GUIDE
dialogue.line: AND RIGHT NEXT TO THAT IS... THE DORMITORY WHERE THE BUTTERFLY KIDS STAY, THE BUTTERFLY PAVILION. THIS IS WHERE YOU'LL BE STAYING FROM NOW ON.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: A TRADITIONAL KOREAN HOUSE? COOL.

dialogue.speaker: GUIDE
dialogue.line: HEHE, DO YOU LIKE IT?

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: ARE THE OTHER BUTTERFLIES IN HERE TOO?

dialogue.speaker: GUIDE
dialogue.line: HMM? AH, RIGHT NOW, THEY'RE BOTH OUT ON A MISSION, SO THE DORM IS EMPTY. THEY SHOULD BE BACK THE DAY AFTER TOMORROW.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: I SEE. SO WHAT SHOULD I DO NOW?

dialogue.speaker: GUIDE
dialogue.line: AH, WELL, TOMORROW, I'LL INTRODUCE YOU TO THE GARDEN. BUT YOU WON'T BE PRESENTED TO THE PUBLIC UNTIL NEXT WEEK OR SO, SO YOU CAN JUST REST AND GET USED TO BEING HERE UNTIL THEN. ALSO, YOU WON'T BE ASSIGNED TO ANY MISSIONS UNTIL YOUR WEAPON IS READY.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: MY WEAPON?

dialogue.speaker: GUIDE
dialogue.line: YEAH, THE BUTTERFLIES ALL USE WEAPONS MADE FROM THEIR OWN BLOOD. SINCE BLOOD IS A LIQUID, IT'S NOT VERY USEFUL FOR ATTACKS, SO WE TURN IT INTO A SOLID FORM THAT THEY CAN USE FOR COMBAT. ALTHOUGH EACH WEAPON HAS ITS OWN UNIQUE FORM. ANYWAY, THERE'S NOTHING TO WORRY ABOUT. ALL THIS WILL TAKE SOME TIME TO GET USED TO, BUT LET ME KNOW IF YOU HAVE ANY QUESTIONS OR NEED ANY HELP.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: SURE, THANK YOU VERY MUCH.

dialogue.speaker: GUIDE
dialogue.line: OH, AND ONE MORE THING. JAYEONG SAID IT BLUNTLY, BUT I WAS GENUINELY RELIEVED. I DIDN'T THINK YOU WOULD ACCEPT ALL OF THIS SO QUICKLY. I WAS WORRIED WE MIGHT HAVE TO TIE YOU DOWN TO KEEP YOU FROM LEAVING IF YOU GOT SCARED AND TRIED TO RUN. I EVEN CONSIDERED A STUN GUN OR A TRACKING DEVICE. HAHA.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: Y-YOU WERE GOING TO DO THAT TO ME?

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: KIND OF SCARY.

dialogue.speaker: GUIDE
dialogue.line: AND JAYEONG MAY BE A BIT ROUGH AROUND THE EDGES, BUT SHE'S NOT A BAD KID, SO TRY NOT TO RESENT HER. SHE JUST HAS A REALLY STRONG SENSE OF RESPONSIBILITY.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: DON'T WORRY, I DON'T RESENT HER.

dialogue.speaker: GUIDE
dialogue.line: HAHA, THANKS.

dialogue.speaker: GUIDE
dialogue.line: NOW, HERE'S YOUR STUFF! I BROUGHT YOU SOME OF YOUR BELONGINGS.

dialogue.speaker: GUIDE
dialogue.line: I SAVED MY NUMBER IN YOUR PHONE, SO CALL OR MESSAGE ME WHENEVER YOU LIKE. HERE ARE THE CLOTHES YOU WERE WEARING AND SOME NEW ONES. YOUR ROOM NUMBER IS WRITTEN ON THE KEY CARD, SO YOU SHOULDN'T HAVE ANY TROUBLE FINDING IT!

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: AH, OKAY. THANKS.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: WOW, SHE BROUGHT EVERYTHING. HAHA.

dialogue.speaker: GUIDE
dialogue.line: WELL, I HAVE A MOUNTAIN OF WORK TO DO, SO I'LL LEAVE YOU TO IT! GET SOME REST AND SEE YOU LATER!

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: S-SURE, SEE YOU.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: SHE'S FAST.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: IS ANYONE IN HERE?

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: WAS THERE AN EARTHQUAKE OR SOMETHING?

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: THIS MUST BE MY ROOM. IT'S CLEAN.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: AN UNFAMILIAR CEILING. I'VE ONLY EVER SEEN THIS PLACE ON TV. IT ALWAYS SEEMED LIKE A DISTANT PARADISE. AND NOW, HERE I AM, AS A BUTTERFLY, OF ALL THINGS. THE FOURTH BUTTERFLY. THE GARDEN. I STILL CAN'T BELIEVE IT. MAYBE THIS IS ALL A DREAM.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: AND ON TOP OF EVERYTHING... IT TURNS OUT THAT THIS BLOOD THAT I'VE ALWAYS HATED SO MUCH HAS THE POWER TO SAVE THE WORLD.

dialogue.speaker: PROTAGONIST
dialogue.line: YOUR SISTER LIED TO YOU ABOUT EVERYTHING. HUINA. IT MUST HAVE BEEN SO HARD FOR YOU, KEEPING ALL THIS TO YOURSELF THAT WHOLE TIME. KNOWING WHAT I AM, HOW DID IT FEEL TO LIVE WITH ME? WASN'T IT STRESSFUL? DIDN'T YOU WANT TO JUST GIVE UP? WERE YOU HAPPY AT ALL? I HAVE SO MANY QUESTIONS, BUT THERE'S NO ONE I CAN ASK NOW. I MISS YOU, HUINA.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WELL, WELL. LOOKS LIKE WE HAVE A NEW LITTLE LARVA IN THE GARDEN.

summary: The protagonist, now identified as the "Fourth Butterfly" and called Maeha, is confronted by Jayeong about his responsibilities in the dire situation with the "bugs." A guide then shows him around the facility, explaining his role and the nature of Butterfly weapons. Alone in his new room, the protagonist reflects on his past, his sister Huina, and his new identity and power, while an ominous new character observes his arrival.
